title: FrameworkState
description: Contract for a consumer's .claude/.framework-state.json. Mirrors the FrameworkState JSDoc typedef in sync.js (line 23): required fields are those the typedef declares non-optional; lastSubstitutionHash and appliedMigrations are optional (forward-migration fields). Unknown extra fields are permitted (additionalProperties: true) so older audit scripts do not hard-fail on newer state files; declared fields are strictly typed.

frameworkVersion.description: Framework semver the consumer is synced to. sync.js validates MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with no prerelease/build suffix.

adoptedFromCommit.description: Framework git commit at adoption time, or null when the framework checkout had no resolvable commit.

additionalProperties.description: Substitution values must never contain '{{' — sync.js validateSubstitutions rejects such values because they break idempotency.

substitutions.description: Placeholder key to replacement value map applied to substituteAt: 'adoption' files.

lastSubstitutionHash.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the canonical substitutions map at the last sync. Optional: absent on states that predate the drift check (forward-migration; sync sets it on the next state write).

propertyNames.description: Keys are repo-relative forward-slash paths. Absolute paths and '..' segments are rejected — sync.js treats them as tampering (scanForUnresolvedMerges skips them; assertWithinRoot throws).

files.description: Per-managed-file sync baseline, keyed by repo-relative path.

syncIgnore.description: Concrete repo-relative paths the consumer has opted out of syncing. Matched by exact string equality in classifyFile — glob patterns here never match anything.

appliedMigrations.description: Migration version IDs recorded by run-migrations.js after each applied/skipped migration. Optional: absent on states that predate the migration runner.

lastAppliedHash.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the normalised content sync.js last wrote (or rebaselined) for this file.

lastAppliedSourcePath.description: The manifest managedFiles entry path (possibly a glob) that governed this file at last sync.

customisedLocally.description: True when the last sync found the consumer's copy diverged and emitted a .framework-new sibling.

adoptedOwnership.description: Optional. True when an adopt-only file's ownership transferred to the consumer.
